---
title: "Simulation Study — AR(2) DGM, AR(1) Fit (Model Misspecification)"
author: "Akshaan Murugesu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE,
                      fig.height = 4, fig.width = 6)
```

```{r libraries}
library(parallel)
library(pracma)
ncores <- max(1, detectCores() - 1)
```

```{r source}
source(here::here("R", "01_core_estimators.R"))
source(here::here("R", "02_dgm.R"))
source(here::here("R", "03_drivers.R"))
source(here::here("R", "04_summary_tables.R"))
```

## Simulation design

Data are generated from a stationary AR(2) with (phi1, phi2) = (0.6, -0.3).
An AR(1) model is deliberately fitted. Performance is evaluated via the
spectral distance D(theta_hat) = integral |f_true(omega) - f_fit(omega)| d omega.

```{r params}
set.seed(2025)

nsim        <- 1000
phi1_true   <- 0.6
phi2_true   <- -0.3
n_values    <- c(50, 75, 100, 200, 300)
alpha_grid  <- seq(0, 1, by = 0.05)
innovations <- c("gaussian", "t5", "chisq5", "exp1")
dir.create(here::here("outputs"), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
rds_file    <- here::here("outputs", "results_ar2_misspec.rds")
```

```{r run-or-load}
if (file.exists(rds_file)) {
  results_all_misspec <- readRDS(rds_file)
  message("Loaded cached results from ", rds_file)
} else {
  results_all_misspec <- setNames(vector("list", length(innovations)), innovations)
  for (innov in innovations) {
    results_all_misspec[[innov]] <- list()
    for (n in n_values) {
      cat("AR(2)->AR(1) |", innov, "| n =", n, "\n")
      results_all_misspec[[innov]][[as.character(n)]] <-
        run_hybrid_grid_ar2_misspec(
          n = n, nsim = nsim,
          phi1_true = phi1_true, phi2_true = phi2_true,
          alpha_grid = alpha_grid, innov = innov, ncores = ncores
        )
    }
  }
  saveRDS(results_all_misspec, rds_file)
  message("Results saved to ", rds_file)
}
```

## Plotting helpers

```{r helpers}
pretty_innov_expr <- function(innov) {
  switch(innov,
    gaussian = quote(N(0,1)), t5 = quote(t[5]),
    chisq5   = quote(chi^2[5]), exp1 = quote(Exp(1)), as.name(innov))
}
add_headroom <- function(ylim, pct = 0.05) {
  ylim[2] <- ylim[2] + pct * diff(ylim); ylim
}
```

## Spectral distance curves and boxplots

```{r plots}
opar <- par(cex.main = 0.95, mar = c(5, 5, 7.2, 2) + 0.1)

for (innov in names(results_all_misspec)) {
  innov_lab <- pretty_innov_expr(innov)
  for (n in n_values) {
    res          <- results_all_misspec[[innov]][[as.character(n)]]
    dist_hybrid  <- res$dist_hybrid
    dist_whittle <- res$dist_whittle
    dist_fdel    <- res$dist_fdel

    mean_dist <- colMeans(dist_hybrid, na.rm = TRUE)
    interior  <- alpha_grid > 0 & alpha_grid < 1
    idx_best  <- which(interior)[which.min(mean_dist[interior])]
    a_best    <- alpha_grid[idx_best]
    d_best    <- dist_hybrid[, idx_best]

    ## ---- Mean spectral distance curve --------------------------------------
    plot(alpha_grid, mean_dist, type = "l", lwd = 2, col = "blue",
         xlab = expression(alpha), ylab = "Mean spectral distance",
         ylim = add_headroom(range(mean_dist, na.rm = TRUE)),
         main = "")
    mtext("Mean spectral distance vs alpha", side = 3, line = 5.2, cex = 1.05)
    mtext(bquote("AR(2)" %->% "AR(1), T =" ~ .(n) ~ ", innovations" ~ .(innov_lab)),
          side = 3, line = 4.0, cex = 1.05)
    grid(col = "grey90", lty = "dotted")
    abline(h = mean(dist_whittle, na.rm = TRUE), col = "purple", lty = 2, lwd = 2)
    abline(h = mean(dist_fdel,    na.rm = TRUE), col = "darkgreen", lty = 2, lwd = 2)
    abline(v = a_best, col = "red", lty = 2)
    text(a_best, min(mean_dist, na.rm = TRUE),
         bquote(alpha["best"] == .(a_best)), pos = 4, cex = 0.7)
    legend("topright",
           legend = c("Hybrid", "Whittle", "FDEL"),
           col    = c("blue", "purple", "darkgreen"),
           lty    = c(1, 2, 2), lwd = 2, bty = "n")

    ## ---- Boxplots of spectral distances ------------------------------------
    lab_expr <- eval(bquote(expression(
      Whittle, FDEL, Hybrid ~ alpha == .(round(a_best, 2)))))
    boxplot(list(Whittle = dist_whittle, FDEL = dist_fdel, Hybrid = d_best),
            main = "",
            ylab = "Spectral distance",
            col  = c("purple", "darkgreen", "blue"),
            names = rep("", 3), xaxt = "n",
            outline = FALSE)
    mtext("Spectral distance distributions", side = 3, line = 5.2, cex = 1.05)
    mtext(bquote("AR(2)" %->% "AR(1), T =" ~ .(n) ~ ", innovations" ~ .(innov_lab)),
          side = 3, line = 4.0, cex = 1.05)
    axis(1, at = 1:3, labels = lab_expr, tick = FALSE)
  }
}

par(opar)
```

## Mean fitted spectral densities (t5, T = 50 — Figure 4.11 in thesis)

```{r spectral-density-plot, fig.height=5, fig.width=7}
set.seed(2025)

innov_case <- "t5"
n_case     <- 50

res_case        <- results_all_misspec[[innov_case]][[as.character(n_case)]]
mean_dist_alpha <- colMeans(res_case$dist_hybrid, na.rm = TRUE)
interior        <- res_case$alpha_grid > 0 & res_case$alpha_grid < 1
alpha_star      <- res_case$alpha_grid[interior][
                     which.min(mean_dist_alpha[interior])]

cat("oracle alpha* =", alpha_star, "\n")

omega_grid <- seq(0, pi, length.out = 2000)
G          <- length(omega_grid)
F_wh       <- matrix(NA_real_, nsim, G)
F_fd       <- matrix(NA_real_, nsim, G)
F_hy       <- matrix(NA_real_, nsim, G)

for (s in seq_len(nsim)) {
  Y     <- simulate_ar2_innov(n = n_case, phi1 = phi1_true, phi2 = phi2_true,
                              innov = innov_case)
  Iper  <- per(Y)
  omega <- freq(Y)

  phi_wh <- tryCatch(
    optim(0.1, obj_Whittle, Iper = Iper, omega = omega,
          method = "L-BFGS-B", lower = -0.9, upper = 0.9)$par,
    error = function(e) NA_real_)
  phi_fd <- tryCatch(
    optim(0.1, obj_FDEL, Iper = Iper, omega = omega,
          method = "L-BFGS-B", lower = -0.9, upper = 0.9)$par,
    error = function(e) NA_real_)
  phi_hy <- tryCatch(
    estimate_hybrid_once(alpha_star, Iper, omega, start = phi_wh),
    error = function(e) NA_real_)

  if (is.finite(phi_wh)) F_wh[s, ] <- spectral(c(phi_wh), p = 1, q = 0, x = omega_grid)
  if (is.finite(phi_fd)) F_fd[s, ] <- spectral(c(phi_fd), p = 1, q = 0, x = omega_grid)
  if (is.finite(phi_hy)) F_hy[s, ] <- spectral(c(phi_hy), p = 1, q = 0, x = omega_grid)
}

f_wh_avg <- colMeans(F_wh, na.rm = TRUE)
f_fd_avg <- colMeans(F_fd, na.rm = TRUE)
f_hy_avg <- colMeans(F_hy, na.rm = TRUE)
f_true   <- spectral(c(phi1_true, phi2_true), p = 2, q = 0, x = omega_grid)

title_expr <- bquote(atop(
  "Mean fitted spectral densities",
  "AR(2): " * phi[1] == .(phi1_true) * ", " * phi[2] == .(phi2_true) *
  ", fit AR(1), " * t[5] * " innovations, T = " * .(n_case)))

## Full scale
par(mar = c(5, 5, 4.8, 2) + 0.1)
ylim_full <- range(c(f_true, f_wh_avg, f_fd_avg, f_hy_avg), finite = TRUE)
plot(omega_grid, f_fd_avg, type = "l", lwd = 2, col = "darkgreen",
     ylim = ylim_full, xlab = expression(omega), ylab = expression(f(omega)),
     main = title_expr)
lines(omega_grid, f_wh_avg, col = "purple", lwd = 2, lty = 2)
lines(omega_grid, f_hy_avg, col = "blue",   lwd = 2, lty = 3)
lines(omega_grid, f_true,   col = "black",  lwd = 2, lty = 1)
legend("topright",
       legend = c("Whittle (mean)", "FDEL (mean)",
                  bquote("Hybrid (mean), " * alpha^"*" == .(alpha_star)),
                  "True AR(2)"),
       col = c("purple", "darkgreen", "blue", "black"),
       lty = c(2, 1, 3, 1), lwd = 2, bty = "n", cex = 0.9)

## Zoomed (y-axis capped at 2 to match thesis figure)
plot(omega_grid, f_fd_avg, type = "l", lwd = 2, col = "darkgreen",
     ylim = c(0, 2), xlab = expression(omega), ylab = expression(f(omega)),
     main = title_expr)
lines(omega_grid, f_wh_avg, col = "purple", lwd = 2, lty = 2)
lines(omega_grid, f_hy_avg, col = "blue",   lwd = 2, lty = 3)
lines(omega_grid, f_true,   col = "black",  lwd = 2, lty = 1)
legend("topright",
       legend = c("Whittle (mean)", "FDEL (mean)",
                  bquote("Hybrid (mean), " * alpha^"*" == .(alpha_star)),
                  "True AR(2)"),
       col = c("purple", "darkgreen", "blue", "black"),
       lty = c(2, 1, 3, 1), lwd = 2, bty = "n", cex = 0.9)
```

## Summary tables

```{r table}
big_table_misspec <- make_big_table_ar2_misspec(results_all_misspec)
print(big_table_misspec)
```

```{r latex, results='asis'}
to_latex_table_ar2_misspec(
  big_table_misspec,
  caption = paste0("Mean spectral distance between the true AR(2) spectrum with",
                   " $(\\phi_{1,0},\\phi_{2,0})=(0.6,-0.3)$ and the fitted AR(1)",
                   " spectrum for Whittle, FDEL and Hybrid estimators under",
                   " different innovations.")
)
```
